title: 目標達成の後に・だって、ウマドル

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is Falco, signing off! ☆ Thanks for watching
my performance! ♪

text_block_list.name: Falco Fans
text_block_list.text:
Falcooo!
That was great!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks again for coming! I hope to see you all
again next time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is doing well in her races. As a
result, she's steadily gaining popularity, and more
and more people are coming to watch her street
performances.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm so lucky to have so many people cheer for me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's only one way to repay everyone, and
that's to become a top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's going to be more races I can enter this
year, so I wanna see my fans from up onstage lots
more.
choice_data_list: We'd better decide our next goal then.
We'd better decide our next goal then.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahh! Our next goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has been improving steadily. I'm
sure she can hold her own in the major
classic-year races.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So, um, about that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out that Smart Falcon has a proposition of
her own—one that catches me off guard.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna run in the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho—the first race of the Classic
Triple Crown. It's a big deal, but...
choice_data_list: You know that's a turf race, right?
You know that's a turf race, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I know I'm always a disaster when it comes
to turf races...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But still, I wanna give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The determination in her eyes reminds me of
when we first met, back when she insisted turf was
the only way. I thought she had moved on...
choice_data_list: You're still attached to running on turf?
You're still attached to running on turf?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, not at all! That's not it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've already decided that I'm gonna run on dirt.
But, well...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Do you remember what that one fan said?

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But don't you want to hear someone with her kind
of energy sing "Winning the Soul"?

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know what you mean. Imagine how hype it
would be seeing her up on stage at the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There are only three opportunities to sing
"Winning the Soul"—the three big turf races of
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I don't go for it now, there'll never be another
chance to sing that song for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't let that happen. I wanna be an Umadol
who meets everybody's expectations!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Until just recently, I could count the number of
fans I had on one hand.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But now, suddenly, there are so many people
cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
They all have such high hopes for me, and I want
to live up to them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a long time, Falco did her best despite having
only a tiny following. That's why she treasures her
fans more than anyone else does. However...
choice_data_list: Winning is not going to be easy.
Winning is not going to be easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only is she ill-suited for turf, the competition
vying for the Triple Crown is top class. Frankly,
I'm worried if she can even put up a fight.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...I know. I know I've never been much good on
turf.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Still! An Umadol never backs down without even
trying!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If there's even one person who believes in me and
wants to hear me sing...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As long as there's a chance of winning, no matter
how small, I wanna go for it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll always chase after any opportunity to shine!
'Cause that's the kind of Umadol I believe in!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So... Trainer! Please let me run in the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's chosen an incredibly difficult road to
walk—for her fans and for her beliefs. As her
trainer, there's really only one thing I can say.
choice_data_list: Hope you're ready for some tough training!
Hope you're ready for some tough training!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahh! Then does that mean...
choice_data_list:
Let's shoot for the moon! Next up, the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swayed by Smart Falcon's determination, I've
made my choice. Our next race is one of the
Classics—the Satsuki Sho!
